prs.title: Staging
prs.author: Jason

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line guard against undefined roleArn is a trivial defensive fix.

prs.title: fix: lazy Redis/BullMQ init to prevent build-time ECONNREFUSED
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Implementing a lazy initialization pattern for Redis/BullMQ to prevent build-time connection errors is a meaningful architectural fix requiring careful proxy design across 73 custom lines.

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A full production ECS deploy workflow in 105 lines covering build, push, and deploy steps is solid DevOps work with meaningful complexity.

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Improving detection logic for 5+ AWS customer launches in the partner badges collector with 81 lines reflects a modest but meaningful signal-parsing feature.

prs.title: Update apprunner.yaml
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Updating apprunner.yaml configuration across 60 lines is primarily infra config work with low complexity.

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adding Redis cluster mode support for ElastiCache Serverless across 4 files with 20 custom lines is a focused but meaningful infrastructure compatibility fix.

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small multi-file fix addressing a staging worker crash and adding Redis TLS support with only 10 custom lines.

prs.title: fix: add /api/health endpoint for ECS ALB health checks
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adding a minimal health check endpoint in 5 lines is a trivial but necessary addition.

prs.title: ci: add ECS staging deploy workflow + worker Dockerfile
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Creating a full ECS staging deploy workflow plus a worker Dockerfile across 135 custom lines is solid foundational DevOps work enabling a new deployment target.

prs.title: Fix AWS Marketplace throttling: lower concurrency & fix retry detection
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small targeted fix lowering concurrency and correcting retry detection for AWS Marketplace throttling across 16 lines in 3 files.

prs.title: Fix marketplace discovery for domain-named sellers (SM-537)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Fixing marketplace discovery for domain-named sellers across 3 files including discovery logic, a collector, and admin tooling represents a solid feature-level bug fix with meaningful scope.

prs.title: Hotfix: marketplace discovery fails for domain-named sellers (SM-537)
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Hotfix targeting the same domain-named seller issue in 44 lines within a single collector file — smaller scoped precursor to the fuller fix in #404.

prs.title: Run Analysis buttons, product filter cleanup, concurrency tuning & admin queue improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Wide-ranging PR touching 8 files with 225 custom lines covering new UI components (Run Analysis buttons), product filter cleanup, concurrency tuning, and admin queue improvements — significant medium-large feature work.

prs.title: Update aws-connect.ts
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A single-file change with only 3 custom lines added and no deletions is a trivial tweak to an AWS connection action.

stories.name: Production & Staging Cloud Infrastructure Deployment
stories.rationale: Established full CI/CD deploy pipelines and configuration for both staging and production environments across ECS and App Runner.

stories.name: Reliable Redis & BullMQ Connectivity for Cloud Environments
stories.rationale: Resolved a series of Redis/BullMQ initialization, TLS, cluster mode, and health check issues to ensure stable queue and cache connectivity in staging and production cloud environments.

stories.name: AWS Marketplace Seller Discovery Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed a critical bug preventing marketplace discovery for sellers using domain-based names, ensuring accurate vendor identification.

stories.name: AWS Integration Stability & Credential Handling
stories.rationale: Improved AWS integration reliability by fixing Marketplace API throttling handling and guarding against undefined role ARNs in credential display.

stories.name: Improved AWS Customer Launch Detection for Partner Badges
stories.rationale: Enhanced the partner badges collector to more accurately detect sellers with 5 or more AWS customer launches.

stories.name: Analysis Workflow & Admin Queue Improvements
stories.rationale: Delivered UI improvements to run analysis controls, product filtering, concurrency tuning, and admin queue visibility for a better operator experience.
